title: pyrenoglyphis bifida
side_effects: Pyrenoglyphis bifida can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe gastrointestinal distress, including diarrhea, abdominal pain, and nausea. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also lead to kidney damage and failure. Additionally, improper use of the plant can cause allergic reactions, resulting in skin rashes, itching, and swelling. In severe cases, it can even cause respiratory problems, including shortness of breath and coughing.
